description: You are a robotics course instructor preparing a Webots simulation environment for an upcoming line-following robot competition. Configure the arena and robot by applying the track texture from /home/ga/webots_projects/line_track/textures/track.png to the RectangleArena floor appearance. Equip the EPUCK robot with E-puckGroundSensors in its groundSensorsSlot and assign the "e-puck_line" controller. Position the robot at translation 0.36 0.36 0 and rotation 0 0 1 -1.5708. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/epuck_line_follow.wbt.
